feature_files_ephemeral.note: temporary extracted BGO2 files; regenerate from source_root_files

poisson_response.primaryHitDefinition: any of 30 segments has Npe >= fixed threshold

split: even eventID train, odd eventID test, independently per sample

fixed_timing_response.response_model: independent Gaussian end-time smearing; deterministic event/segment hash; v_eff from runmeta; provisional because calibration is not supplied

fixed_th_dedx_response.statistics: all events (fixed threshold grid, no optimization)

points.rule: accept dE/dx < threshold; invalid geometry keeps
accept dE/dx < threshold; invalid geometry keeps
accept dE/dx < threshold; invalid geometry keeps
accept dE/dx < threshold; invalid geometry keeps
accept dE/dx < threshold; invalid geometry keeps
accept dE/dx < threshold; invalid geometry keeps

fixed_combined_response.statistics: all events; all thresholds fixed before evaluation

definitions.tlc: any of 30 segments Npe>=1 at collection*PDE=5%
definitions.dedx: electron-like pass dE/dx below cut; invalid geometry keeps
definitions.full_dz: require valid and abs(zReco-zPred)<90 mm, sigma_t=0

fixed_tlc_binary_response.primary_definition: any detector segment has Npe >= fixed threshold

matched_pm1_ablation.definition: any TLC segment in the BGO/TH azimuth +/-1 window has Npe >= fixed threshold

event_total_npe_comparison.definition: sum over all detector segments Npe >= fixed threshold

continuous_tlc_policy: tlcExpected*, tlcNpeTotal, tlcNpeMax, and freely optimized Npe cuts are diagnostic/systematic only; final groups use one fixed binary any-segment hit per response point
